scenarios.name: Taiwan Semiconductor Supply Shock
scenarios.description: A 30% drop in Taiwan's semiconductor exports and its cascade across compute-dependent economies and sectors.

scenarios.name: Suez Canal Route Disruption
scenarios.description: A 35% reduction in crude oil transiting the Suez Canal and the downstream pressure on import-reliant economies and logistics.

scenarios.name: Lithium Price Spike
scenarios.description: A 40% effective supply contraction in Chinese lithium refining and its impact on EV battery production.

scenarios.name: Crude Oil Supply Shock
scenarios.description: A 25% cut in Saudi crude oil output and the cascade into logistics, automotive and downstream sectors.
